summary: claude-gardener is an autonomous AI agent powered by Claude that performs automated 'gardening' tasks — likely maintenance, organisation, or tending to code/files. To use it, simply execute the `run` script; it self-bootstraps by creating a Python virtual environment, installing the Claude Agent SDK and other dependencies, then handing off to the agent logic in `src/main.py`. No manual environment setup is needed.
image_prompt: A glowing digital robot with delicate mechanical hands carefully tending to a lush, luminous garden at dusk. Holographic vines and circuit-board leaves intertwine with real foliage. Soft blue and green bioluminescent light, painterly impressionist style, sense of quiet careful automation and growth.
